name: ask-curl
description: Turn natural-language requests into well-formed cURL commands with 1Password (op://) secret injection, response parsing, request history, and chained calls.

interface.shortDescription: Turn natural-language requests into well-formed cURL commands with 1Password (op://) secret injection, response parsing, request history, and chained calls.
interface.longDescription: Describe the HTTP request you want, review the generated cURL command, and run it with secrets injected at runtime via op run.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Ask cURL safely.
